---
title: "original wide to long conversion script"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# ── 1. Load ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Build path to Excel file and get all sheet names except the summary tab
path <- here("rawdata", "Coral_Deomography_allyears_2013-24_V1.xlsx")
sheets <- excel_sheets(path) |> discard(~ .x == "ALL_SITES")

# Read each sheet into a named list (one data frame per site-habitat combination)
raw_list <- map(sheets, ~ read_excel(path, sheet = .x))
names(raw_list) <- sheets

# ── 2. Diagnose ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Use the first sheet as the reference column set
reference_cols <- names(raw_list[[1]])

# Flag any sheets with extra or missing columns relative to the reference
map(sheets, ~ {
  diff <- setdiff(names(raw_list[[.x]]), reference_cols)  # columns in this sheet but not reference
  miss <- setdiff(reference_cols, names(raw_list[[.x]]))  # columns in reference but not this sheet
  if (length(diff) > 0) cat(.x, "| extra:", diff, "\n")
  if (length(miss) > 0) cat(.x, "| missing:", miss, "\n")
})

# ── 3. Standardize column names ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Two naming inconsistencies need fixing before pivot:
#   - No separator: L2013 -> L_2013 (same for W, H, Obs)
#   - Year in middle: note_2013_extra -> note_extra_2013
fix_names <- function(df) {
  df |>
    rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "^(L|W|H|Obs)(\\d{4})$", "\\1_\\2")) |>
    rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "^note_(\\d{4})_extra$", "note_extra_\\1"))
}
raw_list <- map(raw_list, fix_names)

# ── 4. Verify all columns now match ───────────────────────────────────────────
# Confirm standardization resolved all mismatches before binding
all_same <- map(raw_list, names) |> unique() |> length() == 1
cat("All sheets identical after fix:", all_same, "\n")

# ── 5. Bind and pivot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Stack all sheets into one wide data frame, then pivot to long format
# Each row becomes one coral observation per year
# Columns matching _YEAR (e.g. L_2013) are split into variable name + year
if (all_same) {
  long <- raw_list |>
    bind_rows() |>
    pivot_longer(
      cols = matches("_\\d{4}$"),         # select all columns ending in _YEAR
      names_to = c(".value", "year"),     # split into variable name and year
      names_pattern = "^(.+)_(\\d{4})$"  # regex: everything before last _YEAR
    ) |>
    mutate(year = as.integer(year))
} else {
  stop("Column mismatch remains — check diagnostic output above before proceeding.")
}

# ── 6. Inspect ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Confirm structure and check for unexpected values in key columns
glimpse(long)
unique(long$site)
unique(long$habitat)
unique(long$transect)
unique(long$year)
unique(long$Obs)
unique(long$L)
```
